case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. DAVID JOSEPH EDLOW

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDLOW, DAVID JOSEPH (SBN 160199) $21,757.09 PRINCIPAL, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,087.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
